person.name: MD Mahmudun Nur Miraz
person.summary: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications using React, TypeScript, Node.js, FastAPI, Flask, and REST APIs.
person.about: Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience building full-stack web applications using React, TypeScript, Node.js, FastAPI, Flask, and REST APIs. Strong foundation in frontend and backend development, database design, modular architecture, debugging, and building maintainable software systems. Comfortable working across multiple technologies and eager to contribute to real-world software projects in a collaborative engineering environment.

whatIDo.title: Full-Stack Development
whatIDo.description: I enjoy building complete web applications from the ground up — designing REST APIs, structuring databases, and crafting clean, responsive frontends. There's something satisfying about seeing all the layers work together.

whatIDo.title: AI/ML Research & Experimentation
whatIDo.description: I like exploring how AI systems reason and learn. From face recognition pipelines to LLM reasoning frameworks, I enjoy working on problems where the solution isn't obvious yet.

whatIDo.title: Clean, Maintainable Code
whatIDo.description: I care about writing code that others (and future me) can actually read. Modular design, clear separation of concerns, and good debugging habits are things I actively practice.

research.title: Tree of Thoughts with CodeAct Pattern
points: Designed and implemented a Tree-of-Thoughts reasoning framework using the CodeAct pattern, where LLMs generate and execute Python code at each search step instead of free-form text, enabling verifiable reasoning with sandbox execution

Evaluated the system on the Game of 24 task using DeepSeek (teacher) and Gemma 4 31B, achieving 89% puzzle-solving accuracy on a held-out test set of 100 puzzles with an average of 45 API calls per puzzle
Built a Dead-End Memory module that accumulates structural failure patterns across the search, skipping 30–80% of explored states and reducing redundant API calls per puzzle
Implemented a hybrid two-level pruning system combining static heuristics with dynamic pattern injection into LLM proposals at depth ≥ 2, improving proposal quality as search progresses

Conducted a teacher-student knowledge distillation pipeline: generated 900 annotated reasoning traces with the teacher model, converted them into backtracking training examples, and fine-tuned SmolLM-360M to replicate the teacher's search behavior in a single forward pass — no API calls at inference

Designed a backtracking augmentation strategy (v2) with variable dead-end depths and multi-level backtrack targets; fine-tuned student model achieved 100% arithmetic accuracy per step and learned structured search behavior

Identified a model-specific format compliance gap in smaller instruction-tuned models (Gemma 4 31B, 0% one-word compliance vs GPT-4's reliable zero-shot format following) and implemented a robust last-line extraction workaround that recovered 100% label accuracy from verbose responses

Conducted structured failure analysis including beam selection anomalies, extraction logic inconsistencies, and ground truth label errors in the evaluation suite, with documented root causes and proposed fixes

projects.title: QuickHire — Full-Stack Job Board Platform
points: Designed and developed a full-stack job platform with job browsing, application workflows, and admin management features
Built RESTful backend APIs using Express.js and MongoDB with structured models and organized routing
Implemented search and filtering features with optimized query handling
Developed an admin dashboard to manage job posts and user activity
Applied modular architecture and reusable frontend component design

projects.title: Face Detection System — Real-Time Recognition & Presence Detection
points: Built a full-stack system for face recognition, presence detection, and real-time verification workflows
Developed backend services using FastAPI for person management, enrollment, verification, and activity log handling
Designed PostgreSQL database models using SQLAlchemy for persons, face embeddings, cameras, and detection records
Structured the backend with modular API routes, schemas, models, configuration, and service layers
Built a React frontend for camera-based detection, dashboard monitoring, face enrollment, and verification flows

projects.title: Get Hyped — Agency Website
points: Fully responsive marketing website for a social-first content agency
Scroll-driven expertise card stack animation using a custom scroll progress hook
Mouse trail logo spawn effect with portal rendering to bypass overflow clipping
Custom SVG trapezium footer with separate responsive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Smooth scroll via Lenis with scroll-fade entrance animations on section headings
Animated hamburger menu, header nav with hover slide animation, and hero tilt-on-hover cards

projects.title: Bashpo — Online Game Marketplace
points: Developed a backend-driven marketplace using Flask with authentication and role-based authorization
Implemented product listing, purchasing workflow, and user management features
Designed and maintained a relational database schema using SQLite
Structured the application with clean separation of responsibilities and maintainable backend architecture

projects.title: Weather Forecast Web Application
points: Built a real-time weather application with external API integration and dynamic UI updates
Structured the frontend using reusable React components and state management
Managed environment variables and applied basic API security practices
